nasb.text: And all the skillful men who were performing all the work of the sanctuary came, each from the work which he was performing,

esv.text: so that all the craftsmen who were doing every sort of task on the sanctuary came, each from the task that he was doing,

cnv.text: 凡是作聖所一切工的智慧人，各人都放下自己所作的工，來了。

ccb.text: 以致所有建造圣所的能工巧匠都放下自己的工作，
